properties.title: SHYFEM Taranto (Gulf of Taranto, Mediterranean)
properties.description: SHYFEM-MPI unstructured grid ocean model output for the Gulf of Taranto, produced by CMCC as part of the GlobalCoast project.
properties.institution: Centro Euro-Mediterraneo sui Cambiamenti Climatici - CMCC, Italy

step.description: Forecast lead time (valid time = reference time + step)

node.description: UGRID unstructured mesh node index; lon/lat stored as 1-D node coordinates

element_index.description: maps every element to its three vertices

attrs.description: maps every element to its three vertices
